Issue 1 RCA:
invetory report manager spawns a new process  to generate inventory report data followed by ets updated where it sotres the parameter for which inventory report is generated.

that process return the result to inventory_manager, manager checks current parameter if it matches the report is return to API process.

but do to race condition, new spawed process return result even before next line could be executed(ets update). This caused manager to drop the report generated as there were no params present in ets
Issue 1 CAPA: Occurred with the race condition can be checked at module level
Issue 2 Title: Butler trying path request without any retry timer when path made through rack not updated in cowhca
Issue 2 RCA: The rack was not updated in cowhca because of stale reservations and cowhca was giving path through rack. Because of this the bot was trying path infinitely.
Issue 2 CAPA: It was tested and was working fine seems it's an CPU utilisation issue at infra level.
Learning 1 Note: The rack was not updated in cowhca because of stale reservations and cowhca was giving path through rack. Because of this the bot was trying path infinitely.
